The '''T-21 C-wing''' was a high-performance civilian [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]] produced by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] by the start of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The controls of the T-21 were similar to that of the [[T-16 skyhopper/Legends|T-16 skyhopper]] and [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] which meant that any [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who learned to use one of the craft was able to easily adjust to the others.

==Behind the scenes==
The craft is mentioned in the [[1998]] popup book ''[[X-wing: A Pocket Manual]]''.
